name: Schiphol Group Annual Reports (Contentful CDN workaround)
description: Royal Schiphol Group annual reports via Contentful CDN. Schiphol.nl is Cloudflare-protected; assets.ctfassets.net CDN backing it is publicly accessible.
known_issues: Do not use Playwright or browser automation. Contentful CDN workaround is sufficient.
notes: Contentful content IDs and hashes change per publication. Enumerate via Contentful delivery API or by inspecting schiphol.nl network requests to find current year IDs.
